name: Google Gemini
description: Google's next-generation, natively multimodal AI model.
long_description: Gemini is Google's most capable AI model yet. As a natively multimodal model, it can reason seamlessly across text, images, video, audio, and code. It comes in three sizes—Ultra, Pro, and Nano—allowing it to run on everything from data centers to mobile devices.

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's popular generative AI chatbot that can write, code, and more.
long_description: ChatGPT, developed by OpenAI, is a large language model built on the GPT architecture. It excels at generating human-like text, answering questions, writing code, creating content, and engaging in complex conversations. It's widely used for tasks ranging from content creation to customer support.

name: DeepSeek
description: An open-source LLM for code generation, excelling at various benchmarks.
long_description: DeepSeek is a family of AI models focused on code and text generation, developed by DeepSeek AI. Their models, particularly DeepSeek Coder, have shown exceptional performance on programming benchmarks, often outperforming other open-source models in code completion and generation tasks.

name: Midjourney
description: An independent research lab that produces a proprietary AI image generator.
long_description: Midjourney is an independent research lab that produces a proprietary artificial intelligence program that creates images from textual descriptions. It is accessible via a Discord bot, where users can generate stunning, artistic, and often surreal images using natural language prompts.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's text-to-video model that can generate high-fidelity videos.
long_description: Sora is an AI model from OpenAI that can create realistic and imaginative video scenes from text instructions. It is capable of generating high-definition videos up to a minute long, complete with complex camera motion and multiple characters, representing a significant leap in AI video generation.

name: Perplexity AI
description: An AI-powered search engine that provides direct answers with citations.
long_description: Perplexity AI is a conversational search engine that answers queries directly using information from the web and provides citations for its answers. It's designed to be a more accurate and reliable alternative to traditional search engines by synthesizing information and showing its sources.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Your AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style code suggestions.
long_description: GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered code completion tool developed by GitHub and OpenAI. It integrates directly into your code editor (like VS Code) and provides suggestions for whole lines or blocks of code as you type, significantly speeding up the development process.

name: Claude
description: A family of foundational AI models from Anthropic, focused on safety.
long_description: Claude is a family of large language models developed by Anthropic. Known for its strong focus on AI safety and ethics, Claude is designed to be helpful, harmless, and honest. It's used for summarization, writing, Q&A, and coding, with a reputation for a more 'constitutional' approach to AI.

name: ElevenLabs
description: The leading text-to-speech and voice cloning AI software.
long_description: ElevenLabs is a voice technology research company that develops the most realistic and versatile text-to-speech and voice cloning software. Their models can generate natural-sounding speech in any voice and style, making it popular for content creators, developers, and businesses.

name: Stability AI
description: The open-source generative AI company behind Stable Diffusion.
long_description: Stability AI is the company behind Stable Diffusion, one of the most popular open-source text-to-image models. They focus on building open AI models across various modalities, including image, language, audio, and video, aiming to make advanced AI accessible to everyone.

name: RunwayML
description: AI-powered video editing and text-to-video generation.
long_description: RunwayML is a creative suite of AI-powered tools for video editing, compositing, and generation. Its flagship feature, Gen-2, allows users to generate high-quality video clips from text prompts or existing images.

name: Leonardo AI
description: AI design platform for image and asset creation.
long_description: Leonardo AI is a comprehensive platform for generating and refining AI images and assets. It offers a suite of tools for creating game assets, concept art, and product photography, with fine-grained control over the generation process.

name: PlayHT
description: AI text-to-speech engine with ultra-realistic voices.
long_description: PlayHT provides ultra-realistic AI voices for text-to-speech applications. It's used by creators and businesses to generate high-quality audio for videos, podcasts, e-learning, and IVR systems, with a focus on natural intonation and emotion.

name: Copilot Studio
description: Microsoft's AI customization and automation toolkit.
long_description: Microsoft Copilot Studio is a low-code platform for creating and customizing AI-powered copilots (chatbots). It allows organizations to build assistants that can answer questions, automate tasks, and integrate with business data.

name: Firefly (Adobe)
description: Adobe’s generative AI suite for Photoshop, Illustrator, and video.
long_description: Adobe Firefly is a family of creative generative AI models integrated into Adobe's Creative Cloud suite. It allows creators to use text prompts to generate images, create text effects, recolor artwork, and more, directly within apps like Photoshop and Illustrator.

name: Krea AI
description: Real-time AI image generation and style mixing.
long_description: Krea AI is known for its real-time AI image generator, which allows users to 'paint' with AI and see results instantly. It's a highly interactive tool for creative exploration, style mixing, and image enhancement.

name: Replit AI
description: AI-powered code editing and project generation.
long_description: Replit AI is a coding assistant integrated into the Replit online IDE. It helps developers write, debug, and refactor code, explain complex concepts, and even generate entire projects from a single prompt.

name: Mistral AI
description: Open-source focused LLM provider from Europe.
long_description: Mistral AI is a Paris-based company focused on developing high-performance, open-source language models. Their models, like Mistral 7B and Mixtral, are known for their efficiency and strong performance, offering a powerful alternative to closed-source models.

name: D-ID
description: AI talking avatars & video presenters.
long_description: D-ID is an AI platform that generates videos of talking avatars from a single image and a text or audio script. It's used to create engaging video content for marketing, training, and communication without the need for cameras or actors.

name: Synthesia
description: Text-to-video AI with talking avatars.
long_description: Synthesia is a leading AI video creation platform that allows users to create professional videos with realistic AI avatars and voices in minutes. Users simply type their script, select an avatar, and the platform generates a video, making it ideal for corporate training and marketing.

name: Canva AI
description: AI design automation inside Canva.
long_description: Canva's Magic Studio integrates a suite of AI features directly into its popular design platform. This includes text-to-image generation ('Magic Media'), AI-powered writing ('Magic Write'), and tools to automatically generate presentations or edit photos.

name: Notion AI
description: Writing and organization assistant built into Notion.
long_description: Notion AI is an assistant built directly into the Notion workspace. It helps users write and edit text, summarize long documents, brainstorm ideas, translate content, and organize information more efficiently, all within their existing notes and documents.

name: Blackbox AI
description: AI code search and auto-completion tool.
long_description: Blackbox AI is a code generation and search assistant designed for developers. It can answer coding questions, provide code snippets in various languages, and integrate with VS Code to offer powerful auto-completion and problem-solving capabilities.

name: Character.AI
description: Chat with AI characters, personalities, and bots.
long_description: Character.AI is a unique platform where users can create and interact with AI-powered characters. These characters can be based on fictional figures, historical people, or original creations, allowing for dynamic and creative role-playing and conversation.

name: HeyGen
description: AI video generator for avatar-based content.
long_description: HeyGen is an AI video platform that specializes in creating engaging videos with generative avatars and voices. It's particularly known for its high-quality lip-syncing and video translation features, allowing creators to dub their videos into other languages.

name: Descript
description: AI video and audio editing using text.
long_description: Descript is an all-in-one editor for video and audio that works like a text document. It automatically transcribes your media, allowing you to edit videos by simply editing the text transcript. It also includes AI features like voice cloning ('Overdub') and filler word removal.

name: Luma AI
description: Generate 3D scenes and NeRF models from images.
long_description: Luma AI specializes in generating high-quality 3D models and scenes from images or video. Using Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) technology, it allows users to capture and create photorealistic 3D assets and environments for use in games, VFX, and e-commerce.

name: Pika Labs
description: AI video generation and animation creator.
long_description: Pika is an AI video generator that can create and edit videos from text and image prompts. It's designed to be a user-friendly tool for creators to quickly generate short video clips, animations, and stylized scenes.

name: Tavily AI
description: AI-powered research and browsing API.
long_description: Tavily AI provides a specialized search API designed for large language models. It helps AI agents perform research, find relevant information, and browse the web more effectively by providing concise, fact-checked answers with citations.

name: Whisper
description: OpenAI's advanced speech-to-text transcription model.
long_description: Whisper is an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model from OpenAI, trained on a large and diverse dataset of audio. It's known for its exceptional accuracy in transcribing speech from various languages, accents, and noisy environments.

name: Hugging Face
description: Platform for open-source machine learning models and datasets.
long_description: Hugging Face is a community and platform that provides a vast collection of open-source machine learning models, datasets, and tools. It's the go-to place for developers and researchers to find, share, and collaborate on AI models, especially in natural language processing.

name: Wolfram Alpha
description: Computational engine for math, science, and data reasoning.
long_description: Wolfram Alpha is a 'computational knowledge engine' that answers factual queries by computing the answer from structured data. It excels at mathematics, science, and data analysis, providing expert-level answers and visualizations rather than just links to web pages.

name: Grammarly
description: AI assistant for writing clarity, grammar, and tone.
long_description: Grammarly is an AI-powered writing assistant that helps users improve their writing. It checks for grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors, and also provides suggestions for clarity, tone, and style, making your writing more clear and effective.

name: Rewind AI
description: AI memory tool that records and recalls everything you’ve seen and said on your device.
long_description: Rewind is an AI-powered tool for macOS that records your screen and audio, making your computer's history completely searchable. It allows you to find anything you've seen, said, or heard, acting as a personal 'memory' for your digital life.

name: Futurepedia
description: Largest AI tools directory on the internet.
long_description: Futurepedia is one of the largest and most popular directories of AI tools. It curates and categorizes a vast collection of AI applications, making it easy for users to discover new tools for various tasks, from copywriting to video generation.

name: Gamma App
description: Create pitch decks and docs with AI-designed layouts.
long_description: Gamma is an AI-powered tool for creating presentations, documents, and webpages. Users can generate a complete, beautifully designed deck or document from a single text prompt, drastically reducing the time spent on formatting and design.

name: Podcastle
description: AI-powered podcast recording and editing platform.
long_description: Podcastle is an all-in-one platform for podcast creation, powered by AI. It offers studio-quality recording from your browser, text-based editing, AI-powered audio enhancement ('Magic Dust'), and tools for creating realistic voice clones.

name: AIVA
description: AI music composer for soundtracks and creative scoring.
long_description: AIVA (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Artist) is an AI music composer that creates emotional soundtracks for films, commercials, games, and other creative projects. Users can generate music in various styles or influence the AI by providing their own compositions.

name: Boomy
description: Create and publish songs using AI assistance.
long_description: Boomy is an AI-powered music generation tool that allows anyone to create original songs in seconds. Users can choose a genre, let the AI generate a track, and then publish it to major streaming platforms like Spotify and Apple Music.

name: Veed.io
description: Online AI video editor with captioning and automation.
long_description: Veed.io is an online video editing platform designed to be simple and accessible. It uses AI to automate tasks like adding subtitles, removing background noise, and creating video templates, making video creation easy for marketers and creators.

name: Kaiber AI
description: AI tool for music video and animation generation.
long_description: Kaiber is a creative AI tool that generates videos from text prompts and images. It's particularly popular for creating abstract, artistic, and music-video-style animations with dynamic camera movements and visual effects.

name: Kobold AI
description: AI-powered storytelling and roleplay writing assistant.
long_description: Kobold AI is an open-source, community-driven AI for writing and role-playing. It's a free-to-use tool that allows users to harness various language models for creative writing, text adventure games, and character-driven chat.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI copywriting assistant for ads, blogs, and brand content.
long_description: Jasper is a leading AI copywriting platform that helps marketing teams and businesses create high-quality content for blogs, social media, advertisements, and websites. It's trained on best-in-class marketing frameworks to produce persuasive and brand-consistent copy.

name: ChatDOC
description: AI that extracts insights from PDFs, books, and research papers.
long_description: ChatDOC is an AI tool that allows you to chat with your documents. You can upload PDFs, research papers, or manuals, and then ask questions to quickly find information, get summaries, and extract key insights from the text.

name: TutorAI
description: Personal AI tutor for learning anything step-by-step.
long_description: TutorAI is an AI-powered learning platform that acts as a personal tutor. Users can enter any topic, and the AI will generate a complete course curriculum, including modules, lessons, and quizzes, to help them learn it step-by-step.

name: QuillBot
description: AI paraphrasing and grammar improvement assistant.
long_description: QuillBot is a popular AI writing tool known for its paraphraser, which helps users rewrite sentences and paragraphs. It also includes a grammar checker, summarizer, and citation generator to improve the quality and clarity of writing.

name: MindStudio
description: Build custom AI workflows and assistants visually.
long_description: MindStudio, by YouAI, is a no-code platform that allows anyone to build and deploy custom AI applications. Users can visually chain together different AI models and data sources to create unique workflows and assistants for specific tasks.

name: FlowGPT
description: Discover, share, and use prompt templates.
long_description: FlowGPT is a large community platform for sharing and discovering the best prompts for generative AI models like ChatGPT. Users can find, test, and save prompts for a wide variety of tasks, from marketing to coding.

name: PromptBase
description: Marketplace for buying and selling optimized prompts.
long_description: PromptBase is a marketplace for buying and selling high-quality, engineered prompts for models like DALL-E, Midjourney, and GPT. It connects prompt engineers with users who want to get the best possible results from their AI tools.

name: Superhuman
description: AI-powered email experience with speed and automation.
long_description: Superhuman is a premium email client designed for speed and productivity. It uses AI to help users sort email, write responses faster, summarize long threads, and manage their inbox with a keyboard-first interface.

name: Grok
description: xAI's conversational AI with real-time access to X (formerly Twitter).
long_description: Grok is an AI developed by Elon Musk's xAI. It is designed to answer questions with a bit of wit and has a rebellious streak. Its primary advantage is having real-time access to the world via the X platform, allowing it to discuss current events as they happen.

name: Cursor
description: An AI-powered code editor built on top of VS Code.
long_description: Cursor is a fork of VS Code that integrates AI deeply into the coding workflow. It can see your entire codebase, help you refactor, write new features, and fix bugs using models like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

name: Suno AI
description: Generate full songs with vocals and instrumentation from text.
long_description: Suno is a breakthrough generative AI that creates realistic songs, including lyrics, melodies, and vocals. Users can specify a genre and topic, and Suno produces a complete 2-minute track that sounds professionally produced.

name: Adobe Premiere Pro (AI)
description: Industry-standard video editing with AI-powered 'Generative Extend'.
long_description: Adobe Premiere Pro has integrated Firefly AI to allow video editors to extend clips, remove objects, and add b-roll using text prompts. It also features 'Text-Based Editing' where you can edit video by deleting words in the transcript.

name: Consensus
description: AI search engine that finds answers in peer-reviewed research.
long_description: Consensus is an academic search engine that uses AI to extract and summarize findings from scientific research. It helps users find evidence-based answers to questions across medicine, science, and social sciences.

name: Udio
description: High-fidelity AI music generation focusing on artistic quality.
long_description: Udio is a competitor to Suno, created by former Google DeepMind researchers. It allows users to create studio-quality music across any genre by simply describing the style and lyrics, known for its particularly clear vocal quality.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that transcribes and summarizes calls.
long_description: Otter.ai records audio, writes notes, captures action items, and generates summaries for meetings. It integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams to provide real-time transcription and collaborative note-taking.

name: Phind
description: An AI search engine and answer engine specifically for developers.
long_description: Phind is optimized for coding queries. It provides direct answers with code snippets and links to documentation, pulling from sources like StackOverflow and GitHub to help developers solve technical problems faster.

name: Humane
description: AI-powered wearable 'Pin' and software platform.
long_description: Humane is the creator of the AI Pin, a screenless wearable device that uses a laser link display and voice commands to interact with an AI operating system for messaging, translation, and information search.

name: Jasper Art
description: AI image generator built for marketing and social media teams.
long_description: Jasper Art uses DALL-E and Stable Diffusion models but optimizes them for commercial use. It allows marketing teams to quickly generate high-resolution, watermark-free images for blog posts, ads, and social media campaigns.

name: Perplexity Pages
description: AI-powered tool to create structured, shareable research reports.
long_description: A feature of Perplexity AI that allows users to turn a search query into a full, beautifully formatted article or report. It synthesizes web data, adds images, and organizes content into sections with full citations.

name: Figma AI (Config 2024)
description: AI design tools integrated into Figma for prototyping and workflows.
long_description: Figma's AI tools help designers generate UI layouts, organize layers, and automate repetitive tasks. Features like 'Make Design' allow users to generate initial UI drafts from text prompts directly within the Figma canvas.

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that automates literature reviews.
long_description: Elicit uses language models to help researchers find relevant papers without perfect keyword matches, summarize takeaways from papers, and extract data from PDFs into structured tables.

name: Viggle AI
description: AI video tool for character consistency and movement transfer.
long_description: Viggle allows users to take a static image of a character and apply motion from a video to it. It's widely used for creating viral 'dance' memes and consistent character animations in AI video production.

name: Pi
description: Inflection AI's personal, highly empathetic chatbot.
long_description: Pi (Personal Intelligence) is designed to be a supportive and conversational companion. It focuses on high-EQ interactions, making it ideal for brainstorming, venting, or having long, nuanced conversations rather than just technical tasks.

name: Read.ai
description: AI for automated meeting summaries and scheduling efficiency.
long_description: Read.ai joins your meetings to provide transcription, but more importantly, it measures audience engagement and sentiment. It generates 'playback' highlights so people can skip meetings and catch up in minutes.

name: Harvey AI
description: AI platform built specifically for elite law firms.
long_description: Harvey is a legal-specific AI built on top of OpenAI models. It assists lawyers with contract analysis, due diligence, litigation, and regulatory compliance, ensuring higher accuracy for legal professional workflows.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator known for exceptional text rendering.
long_description: Ideogram is a text-to-image generator that excels where others struggle: typography. It can accurately render complex text, signs, and labels within an image, making it a favorite for logo and poster designers.

name: Amazon Q
description: AWS's generative AI-powered assistant for businesses.
long_description: Amazon Q is a work assistant that can be tailored to a company's business. It helps employees solve problems, generate content, and take actions using the data and expertise found in their company's systems.

name: Mubert
description: AI-generated royalty-free music for streamers and creators.
long_description: Mubert provides an endless stream of AI-generated music tailored to a specific mood or activity. It is widely used by YouTubers and streamers to get high-quality background music that won't trigger copyright strikes.

name: Gamma AI (Websites)
description: Generate full landing pages and websites from a text prompt.
long_description: An expansion of the Gamma App, this tool allows users to describe a business or project and receive a multi-section, responsive website layout with copy and images in under a minute.

name: CapCut (AI Features)
description: Mobile and desktop video editor with AI auto-captions and effects.
long_description: Owned by ByteDance, CapCut has integrated several AI features like 'Auto-Cut', 'AI Script-to-Video', and 'Background Removal', making it the leading tool for TikTok and Reel content creators.

name: Search Labs (SGE)
description: Google's AI-powered Search Generative Experience.
long_description: SGE brings generative AI directly into Google Search results. It provides an AI-written overview of a topic with links to further reading, effectively changing the way users find information online.

name: Spline AI
description: Generate and edit 3D objects and scenes using text.
long_description: Spline AI allows users to create 3D assets by describing them. It can generate objects, apply textures, and even set up lighting, making 3D design accessible to those without traditional modeling skills.

name: Tabnine
description: Private and secure AI code completion for enterprise.
long_description: Tabnine is one of the original AI coding assistants. It focuses on privacy, allowing companies to train models on their own codebase without leaking data, providing highly relevant autocomplete suggestions.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI-powered note-taking and research assistant.
long_description: NotebookLM is a personalized AI research assistant that uses your own documents as its primary source of knowledge. It can summarize complex materials, answer specific questions about your notes, and even generate 'Audio Overviews'—podcast-style discussions between two AI hosts about your content.

name: Lindy
description: AI personal assistant that can handle entire workflows and tasks.
long_description: Lindy is an AI employee capable of handling end-to-end tasks like triaging emails, scheduling meetings, and managing customer support. It connects to your existing apps and learns your specific workflows to act as a truly autonomous digital assistant.

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered full-stack application builder from text prompts.
long_description: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer) allows users to build, deploy, and iterate on full-stack web applications just by describing them. It handles frontend, backend, and database integration, making it a leader in the 'vibe coding' movement of 2026.

name: Glean
description: AI-powered search and knowledge management for enterprises.
long_description: Glean searches across all of a company's internal tools—like Slack, Drive, Jira, and GitHub—to provide instant, cited answers to employee questions. It acts as a central 'brain' for large organizations to find internal information quickly.

name: Fathom
description: AI meeting recorder that highlights and syncs key moments.
long_description: Fathom is a free Zoom, Meet, and Teams app that records, transcribes, and highlights the important parts of your meetings. It automatically syncs summaries and action items into your CRM or Slack, saving hours of manual note-taking.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: Generative UI system to build web interfaces with AI.
long_description: v0 allows developers to generate copy-and-paste friendly React code (using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI) based on text prompts. It is designed to bridge the gap between design and development by instantly creating usable UI components.

name: Cognition (Devin)
description: The world’s first fully autonomous AI software engineer.
long_description: Devin is an autonomous AI agent capable of planning and executing complex engineering tasks. It can learn new technologies, build and deploy apps from start to finish, and even fix bugs in open-source repositories independently.

name: Intercom (Fin AI)
description: AI customer service bot that provides human-like support.
long_description: Fin is Intercom’s latest AI agent, designed to resolve customer issues instantly using your support articles. It reduces support volume by providing accurate, cited answers in a conversational format across chat and email.

name: Kittl AI
description: AI-powered graphic design platform for branding and merch.
long_description: Kittl integrates advanced generative AI features into a powerful vector design tool. It allows users to generate complex illustrations, logos, and textures that are fully editable, specifically optimized for merchandise and print-on-demand.

name: Higgsfield
description: Mobile-first AI video generation for social media creators.
long_description: Higgsfield is a video-to-video and text-to-video platform designed specifically for the vertical video era. It focuses on highly realistic human movement and character consistency, making it a top choice for TikTok and Instagram creators.

name: Reclaim.ai
description: AI calendar assistant that optimizes your daily schedule.
long_description: Reclaim uses AI to automatically find the best time for your meetings, tasks, habits, and breaks. It balances your workload by moving flexible tasks around and protecting your focus time based on your priorities.

name: Shortwave
description: The smartest AI email client built on top of Gmail.
long_description: Shortwave uses AI to transform your messy inbox into a organized workspace. It summarizes long threads, drafts high-quality replies in your voice, and uses an AI assistant to search your entire email history to answer factual questions.

name: Bolt.new
description: Full-stack web development platform powered by AI agents.
long_description: Bolt.new allows you to prompt, build, and deploy full-stack web applications directly in your browser. It leverages a 'browser-based IDE' where an AI agent writes the code and sets up the environment for you in seconds.

name: Vapi AI
description: Build real-time AI voice agents for phone calls and apps.
long_description: Vapi is a developer platform for building low-latency, conversational AI voice bots. It is widely used for automating customer phone support, scheduling appointments, and creating voice-first interactive experiences.

name: LTX Studio
description: Holistic AI video production platform for storyboarding and films.
long_description: LTX Studio offers a comprehensive creative workspace for professional video creators. It features frame-by-frame control, character consistency across scenes, and automated storyboarding, making it a 'command center' for AI-led filmmaking.

name: Obviously AI
description: No-code platform to build and deploy machine learning models.
long_description: Obviously AI allows business users to run predictive analytics without writing code. You can upload a CSV, select a column to predict, and the AI builds a model to forecast sales, churn, or lead conversion in minutes.

name: Flow (Google DeepMind)
description: Google's advanced creative AI tool for video storytelling.
long_description: Flow is a specialized creative tool from Google DeepMind that utilizes the Veo model to help users generate cinematic video sequences. It allows for detailed directorial control over camera angles and character actions via text.

name: Rosebud AI
description: AI-powered game development platform for 3D worlds.
long_description: Rosebud AI allows users to 'vibe code' entire 3D games from text descriptions. It generates assets, scripts character behaviors, and builds environments, lowering the barrier to entry for game development significantly.

name: Abnormal Security
description: AI-native email security platform for enterprise defense.
long_description: Abnormal Security uses behavioral AI to stop modern email attacks like Business Email Compromise (BEC). It builds a 'human behavior' profile for every employee to detect and block anomalies that traditional filters miss.

name: NoteGPT
description: AI assistant for high-speed note-taking and video summarization.
long_description: NoteGPT is specifically designed to help students and professionals digest long-form content. It can summarize hours of YouTube videos, long PDFs, or recorded lectures into structured study notes and mind maps instantly.

name: Airtable AI
description: Native AI features to automate data workflows in Airtable.
long_description: Airtable AI allows teams to summarize content, categorize data, and generate creative copy directly within their existing databases. It enables businesses to build complex, AI-powered applications on top of their structured data.

name: Ambience Healthcare
description: The operating system for AI in clinical healthcare.
long_description: Ambience provides an 'AI medical scribe' that listens to patient visits and automatically generates high-quality clinical documentation. It helps doctors reduce burnout by automating the charting process and administrative tasks.

name: Fireflies.ai
description: AI voice assistant that transcribes and analyzes voice conversations.
long_description: Fireflies is a leading meeting assistant that not only transcribes calls but also allows users to search through transcripts for specific topics, track speaker sentiment, and generate custom summaries for any business meeting.

name: Make (AI Agents)
description: Visual automation platform with native AI agent support.
long_description: Make (formerly Integromat) has evolved to include native AI building blocks. Users can now visually build complex automations that include LLM reasoning steps, allowing for 'smart' workflows that can process and decide on data as it moves between apps.

name: Thinking Machines
description: Next-generation research lab building advanced AGI models.
long_description: Founded by Mira Murati, Thinking Machines is a 2026 breakout lab focused on creating high-reasoning, safe AI models. Their platform is being built to handle the world's most complex scientific and engineering problems using advanced neural architectures.
